title: Vlog B-Roll: Cafe Morning
summary: Steam rising from a freshly poured latte on a wooden counter, warm morning light.
prompt: A handheld vlog-style b-roll shot: a barista's hand sets down a glass of golden latte on a dark wooden counter. Steam curls up slowly into a beam of warm morning sunlight pouring through the window. Soft focus background of customers and a chalkboard menu. Natural film grain, slightly desaturated indie-film color palette, gentle camera sway.
